description_long: This is a rectangular, upright beverage carton with a predominantly white and blue color scheme, featuring a large, colorful image of a sliced mango and a whole mango on the front. The front label reads 'Paradise Mango' in bold blue and white letters, with additional branding and a logo above. The carton has a white plastic screw cap located at the top corner, which is slightly angled. The sides of the carton display nutritional information, a barcode, and other product details in smaller text. The surface appears to be made of laminated paperboard with a glossy finish, and the overall shape is tall and boxy, typical of drink cartons found in urban convenience stores.
description: A tall, rectangular mango-flavored drink carton with a white screw cap and vibrant fruit imagery on the front. The surface is glossy with detailed branding and product information on the sides.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile of the carton, with part of the branding and the white screw cap visible at the top.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the 'Paradise Mango' label, colorful mango images, and the main branding elements.
description_view_2: Opposite side view featuring the barcode, additional product details, and the cap at the top.
description_view_3: Back view showing extensive nutritional information and text, with minimal branding.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front label features 'Paradise Mango' in large blue and white text, with a red logo above and images of mangoes. Sides and back have nutritional information, barcode, and smaller text in black and blue. Branding is clear and visually prominent on the front.
attribute_cap_type: White plastic screw cap, round, located at the top corner, with a slightly raised profile and ribbed edges for grip.
attribute_transparency: The carton is opaque with no visible transparency; the material is fully covered with printed graphics and text.
attribute_bottle_neck_design: Short, slightly angled neck integrated into the top corner of the carton, with threading for the screw cap and a smooth transition from the main body.
